description:
The openssh-server package should be removed. The openssh-server package can be removed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf remove openssh-server
rationale:
Without protection of the transmitted information, confidentiality, and
integrity may be compromised because unprotected communications can be
intercepted and either read or altered.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the openssh-server package is installed: 
$ rpm -q openssh-server
title: Remove the OpenSSH Server Package
